storage_budget.working_set_policy: Use staged/streaming cache if source total exceeds the 5TiB working-set limit; do not silently drop required D2E sources.

auxiliary_candidates.name: Atari-HEAD
auxiliary_candidates.supervision: frame-level human keystroke action labels with gaze/reward metadata
auxiliary_candidates.notes: Public human demonstration dataset; action space is Atari/ALE, not desktop keyboard/mouse.

auxiliary_candidates.name: p-doom/atari-assault-dataset
auxiliary_candidates.notes: Useful as a small open-license action-conditioned game-video candidate; not D2E-style desktop input.

auxiliary_candidates.name: NetHack Learning Dataset
auxiliary_candidates.notes: Large action-labeled game trajectory candidate; terminal/symbolic observations differ from D2E video.

auxiliary_candidates.name: MineRL
auxiliary_candidates.notes: 3D game trajectory candidate; integration depends on current dataset availability and license review.
